0.content:
# Fortinet FortiGate Traffic Analysis

Real-time visibility into Fortinet FortiGate FortiOS 7.x logs. Logs are generated by the **Fortinet FortiGate Log Generator** workflow every 5 minutes covering traffic, UTM/IPS, VPN, and system event families.

`log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"`

1.title: 1. All FortiGate Logs — Overview
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| fields timestamp,
         fortinet.type,
         fortinet.subtype,
         fortinet.action,
         fortinet.srcip,
         fortinet.dstip,
         fortinet.service,
         fortinet.policyname,
         fortinet.srcintf,
         fortinet.dstintf,
         fortinet.dstport,
         fortinet.sentbyte,
         fortinet.rcvdbyte,
         hostname
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

2.title: 2. Blocked Traffic Only
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| fields timestamp,
         fortinet.action,
         fortinet.srcip,
         fortinet.dstip,
         fortinet.service,
         fortinet.policyname,
         fortinet.dstport,
         fortinet.srcintf,
         fortinet.dstintf,
         fortinet.srccountry,
         fortinet.dstcountry
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

3.title: 3. Allowed Traffic Only
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action == "accept"
| fields timestamp,
         fortinet.action,
         fortinet.srcip,
         fortinet.dstip,
         fortinet.service,
         fortinet.policyname,
         fortinet.dstport,
         fortinet.sentbyte,
         fortinet.rcvdbyte
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

4.title: 4. Traffic Summary — Accept vs Block
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| fieldsAdd is_blocked = fortinet.action != "accept"
| summarize total = count(),
            allowed = countIf(NOT is_blocked),
            blocked = countIf(is_blocked)
| fieldsAdd allowed_pct = round(toDouble(allowed) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1),
            blocked_pct = round(toDouble(blocked) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)

5.title: 5. Blocked by Firewall Policy
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            unique_sources = countDistinct(fortinet.srcip),
            unique_services = countDistinct(fortinet.service),
            by: { fortinet.policyname }
| sort block_count desc

6.title: 6. Blocked by Service
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            policies_triggered = collectDistinct(fortinet.policyname),
            by: { fortinet.service }
| sort block_count desc

7.title: 7. Blocked by Action Type
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| summarize count = count(),
            by: { fortinet.action }
| sort count desc

8.title: 8. Interface Pair Analysis
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| summarize total = count(),
            allowed = countIf(fortinet.action == "accept"),
            blocked = countIf(fortinet.action != "accept"),
            by: { fortinet.srcintf, fortinet.dstintf }
| fieldsAdd block_rate = round(toDouble(blocked) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| sort block_rate desc

9.title: 9. Top Blocked Destination IPs
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            attacking_sources = countDistinct(fortinet.srcip),
            services_targeted = collectDistinct(fortinet.service),
            ports_targeted = collectDistinct(fortinet.dstport),
            by: { fortinet.dstip }
| sort block_count desc
| limit 20

10.title: 10. Top Blocked Source IPs
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            targets = countDistinct(fortinet.dstip),
            policies_hit = collectDistinct(fortinet.policyname),
            by: { fortinet.srcip, fortinet.srccountry }
| sort block_count desc
| limit 20

11.title: 11. Traffic Events Over Time
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| fieldsAdd is_blocked = fortinet.action != "accept"
| makeTimeseries allowed = countIf(NOT is_blocked),
                 blocked = countIf(is_blocked),
                 interval: 5m

12.title: 12. High-Risk Port Blocks
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action != "accept"
| filter fortinet.dstport == 3389
     OR fortinet.dstport == 1433
     OR fortinet.dstport == 3306
     OR fortinet.dstport == 21
     OR fortinet.dstport == 445
     OR fortinet.dstport == 23
| fields timestamp,
         fortinet.srcip,
         fortinet.dstip,
         fortinet.dstport,
         fortinet.service,
         fortinet.action,
         fortinet.policyname,
         fortinet.srccountry
| sort timestamp desc

13.title: 13. IPS Detections by Attack Signature
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "utm"
| filter fortinet.subtype == "ips"
| summarize count = count(),
            by: { fortinet.attack, fortinet.severity }
| sort count desc

14.title: 14. Bandwidth by Service (Allowed Traffic)
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "fortinet-fortigate"
| filter fortinet.type == "traffic"
| filter fortinet.action == "accept"
| summarize total_bytes_sent = sum(fortinet.sentbyte),
            total_bytes_received = sum(fortinet.rcvdbyte),
            session_count = count(),
            by: { fortinet.service }
| fieldsAdd total_bytes = total_bytes_sent + total_bytes_received
| sort total_bytes desc
